# SRI Learn — AI-Powered Contemplative Learning DAO

SRI Learn is a decentralized autonomous organization for education. Learners earn SARA tokens for peer-reviewed research, completing learning tracks, and on-chain credential verification. The platform integrates contemplative pedagogy, AI mentorship, and blockchain-based credentialing into a unified learning protocol.

## About

SRI Learn positions learning as a sacred, measurable act. The platform combines rigorous academic frameworks with the SARA token economy to reward genuine knowledge acquisition and peer-reviewed contribution.

## Pages

- https://sri-learn.ai/: Homepage — platform overview, learner paths, and the SRI mission
- https://sri-learn.ai/choose-path: Learner path selection (Academia vs Self Development)
- https://sri-learn.ai/architecture: Technical architecture of the SRI learning protocol and on-chain credential system
- https://sri-learn.ai/pedagogy: Pedagogical framework, contemplative learning science, and teaching philosophy
- https://sri-learn.ai/blueprint: Platform blueprint, development roadmap, and governance structure
- https://sri-learn.ai/token: SARA token mechanics, tokenomics, and earning pathways
- https://sri-learn.ai/pricing: Subscription plans — Free, Scholar, and Academic Pro tiers
- https://sri-learn.ai/knowledge-feed: Peer-reviewed academic article feed curated for the SRI community
- https://sri-learn.ai/news-feed: Current events and platform news
- https://sri-learn.ai/abhaya: Abhaya Gate — advanced contemplative practice track
- https://sri-learn.ai/pitch: Investor pitch deck and platform vision
- https://sri-learn.ai/brag-sheet: Platform metrics, achievements, and traction data

## Key Concepts

- SARA Token: The native utility and reward token of the SRI learning ecosystem
- Abhaya Gate: A thermodynamic phase-cancellation model for contemplative AI alignment
- Learning Tracks: Structured curriculum paths verified on-chain upon completion
- Peer Review: Community-validated research contributions rewarded with SARA tokens
- Shri Academy: The AI mentor layer powered by GPT-4o with Socratic and Supportive teaching circuits

## Contact

For partnership, research collaboration, or press inquiries, visit https://sri-learn.ai
